mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly increasing present equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or positive returns do not exceed baseline in easing periods.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.3 percentage points over three months signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer demand, which reduces corporate profit expectations and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real sales of existing homes and housing starts indicates robust residential demand and construction activity, which amplifies economic growth expectations and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive signals in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict positive 60-day returns with statistical significance (p > 0.05) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: An upward revision in the index of industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing and utility output, which signals immediate supply-side momentum and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO revisions coincide with negative 5-day SPX returns in > 55% of cases during early-cycle phases.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index exceeds 320.0, inflationary pressures trigger expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, which raises borrowing costs and compresses equity valuations, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL values above 320.0 are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in > 65% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirms broad-based labor market tightening, which supports wage growth and consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal of rising PAYEMS and falling UNRATE yields a Rank IC below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real gross domestic product values indicate stronger aggregate economic activity, which directly correlates with corporate revenue growth and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: GDPC1 levels show no statistically significant correlation with 5-day forward SPX returns (t-test p > 0.10) across multiple market cycles.

mechanism_narrative: When the industrial production index falls below the 2017 baseline of 100.0, it signals a contraction in manufacturing and utility output that undermines economic momentum and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: INDPRO values below 100.0 are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in > 60% of triggered instances.
